---
title: "Gallery"
listing:
  - id: professional-projects
    contents: prof_projects
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, description]
    sort: "date desc"
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 180px
  - id: personal-projects
    contents: personal_projects
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, description]
    sort: "date desc"
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 180px
---

## Professional Projects

::: {#professional-projects}
:::

add apac project here
add sfcc newsletter project here

## Personal Projects

::: {#personal-projects}
:::

add stocks project here
martain project
uber project USF
add airbnb uci
